mapper.sql: id, conversation_id, agent_name, user_id, summary, summary_type, keywords, message_count, token_count, generated_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO session_summaries (conversation_id, agent_name, user_id, summary, summary_type, keywords, message_count, token_count, generated_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{agentName}, #{userId}, #{summary}, #{summaryType}, #{keywords}, #{messageCount}, #{tokenCount}, #{generatedAt}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE summary = VALUES(summary), summary_type = VALUES(summary_type), keywords = VALUES(keywords), message_count = VALUES(message_count), token_count = VALUES(token_count), generated_at = VALUES(generated_at), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT FROM session_summaries WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM session_summaries WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND agent_name = #{agentName} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM session_summaries WHERE conversation_id IN
#{id}
mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS session_summaries ( id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '摘要ID', conversation_id VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL COMMENT '会话ID', agent_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Agent名称', user_id VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '用户ID', summary TEXT COMMENT '会话摘要内容', summary_type VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'session_overview' COMMENT '摘要类型：session_overview, key_points, outcomes', keywords JSON COMMENT '关键词（JSON数组）', message_count INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '消息数量', token_count INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'Token数量（估算）', generated_at TIMESTAMP COMMENT '摘要生成时间', created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间', INDEX idx_conversation_id (conversation_id), INDEX idx_user_id (user_id), INDEX idx_agent_name (agent_name), FULLTEXT INDEX ft_summary (summary) WITH PARSER ngram ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='会话摘要表'
